title: Towelogy Bamboo Bath Sheets (90x140 cm) – Super Soft, Quick Drying & Eco-FriendlyTowels for Spa, Shower, Gym & Home Use (2, Silver)
features: Extra Large Size for Full Coverage & Comfort - Measuring 90x140 cm, this oversized bamboo bath sheet offers full-body coverage and a wrap-around feel, making it ideal for adults and tall individuals. It delivers a luxurious spa-like drying experience in the comfort of your home.

Ultra-Absorbent & Fast Drying Bamboo-Cotton Blend Bath Sheets - Expertly crafted from a high-performance blend of 60% bamboo and 40% cotton, this extra large bath towel offers the perfect balance of softness, absorbency, and durability. It soaks up moisture quickly after a bath or shower and dries faster than traditional towels, helping prevent musty odors and keeping your towel feeling fresh.

Eco-Friendly & OEKO-TEX Certified Safe for Skin -Made from sustainably sourced bamboo and OEKO-TEX certified, this jumbo bath sheet is free from harsh chemicals and safe for even the most sensitive skin. A great choice for eco-conscious households and people with allergies or delicate skin.

Perfect for Home, Spa, Gym, and Travel - Versatile and lightweight, this bath sheet is ideal for multiple settings—whether you’re using it at home, packing it for a spa day, heading to the gym, or traveling. Enjoy hotel-style luxury wherever you go.

Durable, Fade-Resistant & Easy to Maintain - Designed for everyday use, this Extar large bamboo bath towel is machine washable and retains its softness and color even after many washes. It’s built to last while staying plush and smooth, making it a smart long-term addition to your towel collection.
description: Elevate your everyday bath experience with the Towelogy Bamboo Extra Large Bath Sheet, thoughtfully crafted for those who seek luxury, functionality, and sustainability in one. With a generous size of 90x140 cm, this bath towel wraps you in ultra-soft comfort while offering full coverage, making it perfect after a relaxing shower, rejuvenating spa session, or intense gym workout. What makes it truly special is the highly absorbent and quick-drying bamboo fabric—naturally breathable, odor-resistant, and gentle on sensitive skin. Unlike traditional cotton towels, our bamboo towels dry faster, stay fresher longer, and feel cooler on the skin. Plus, they’re OEKO-TEX certified, meaning they’re tested for harmful substances and safe for everyday use. Whether you're upgrading your bathroom essentials or looking for a travel-friendly towel that doesn’t compromise on luxury, Towelogy delivers softness, style, and sustainability in every thread.
